LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT CRUSADER INSURANCE COMPANY'S MOTION FOR DISCHARGE OF OBLIGATIONS AND TO RECOVER ATTORNEYS FEES AND COSTS IN CONNECTION WITH INTERPLEADER IS GRANTED. MINI MINUTES:

MARGO SEELY, COURT APPOINTED SPANISH INTERPRETER HELPING DEFENDANT;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

PLAINTIFF LAW OFFICE OF IAN ZIMMERMAN'S Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award is Granted in light of the ruling on the Petition to Vacate or Correct Arbitration Award. Prevailing party to prepare a form of order. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Ann Delgado, CSR # 11185 =302/ehg

Notice Of Motion (Petition) And Motion (Petition) Regarding Petition To Vacate/Correct Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Mar-19-2015 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - MIRTHA ESTRADA, TEL. NO. 368-5716, DEFENDANT APPEARING WITHOUT COUNSEL;
MARGO SEELY, COURT APPOINTED SPANISH INTERPRETER HELPING DEFENDANT;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - NOTICE WAS NOT GIVEN TO THE COURT AND OPPOSING PARTY TO CONTEST AFTER THE TENTATIVE RULING CAME OUT. THE MATTER WAS DISCUSSED. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANTS MIRTHA ESTRADA AND ASHWIN LADVA, ESQUIRE'S Petition To Vacate/Correct Arbitration Award is Denied. First, the parties explicitly stipulated on the record at the arbitration that they were waiving their right to appeal the arbitration award, with the sole exception for allegations of fraud. (Declaration of Eric Tosaris, Ex. F, Arbitration Hearing Transcript, p. 11:10 - 12:3.) There are no allegations of fraud here. The waiver is valid and enforceable. (See Pratt v. Gursey, Schneider & Co. (2000) 80 Cal.App.4th 1105, 1107.) Second, even if the parties did not waive the right to appeal, Petitioners have not established that the arbitrator exceeded his powers. Petitioners explicitly agreed that the arbitrator would have the authority to "cover and resolve any and all disputes as to fees and/or costs between all of the attorneys and Mirtha Estrada." (Declaration of Eric Tosaris, Ex. E.) The arbitration award does precisely that. Prevailing party to prepare a form of order. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Ann Delgado, CSR # 11185 =302/ehg

Mtn To Recover Attorney'S Fees And Costs From Sums Deposited With The Court In Interpleader
Off Calendar Feb-04-2015 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Attorneys IAN P. ZIMMERMAN and ERIC TOSARIS of the Law Offices of Ian Paul Zimmerman, APC, Tel No. (415) 887-9394 appearing for Plaintiff Law Office of Ian P. Zimmerman, APC;
Atty. ASHWIN LADVA of Ladva Law Firm, Tel No. (415) 296-8844 appearing for Defendants Ashwin Ladwa and Mirtha Estrada.

RULING - A R G U E D - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF LAW OFFICE OF IAN ZIMMERMAN'S Motion To Recover Attorney's Fees And Costs From Sums Deposited With The Court In Interpleader is denied without prejudice as premature. Plaintiff seeks to collect fees based on an allegedly binding arbitration award, but the court has yet to confirm that award and/or determine whether it is enforceable. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE AND SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Melanie Dawn Gheno, CSR #7489 (302/EHG)
